description_long: This is a short wooden fence section composed of four vertical pickets with irregular, jagged tops, attached to two horizontal rails. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving the fence a rustic and natural appearance. The pickets are evenly spaced, and the rails are slightly wider than the pickets, providing structural support. One detached post is visible, suggesting the fence is modular or in the process of being installed or repaired. The overall construction appears lightweight and suitable for decorative or low-security purposes, such as marking boundaries in gardens, parks, or residential yards. The finish is matte, with a natural brown color and a slightly rough texture typical of unfinished or lightly treated wood.
description: A short, rustic wooden fence section with four jagged-topped pickets and two horizontal rails, featuring a visible wood grain and a detached post.
description_view_0: Front view showing four vertical pickets with jagged tops, two horizontal rails, and a detached post to the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the fence and the detached post, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the same four pickets and two rails, with the detached post now on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thin profile of the fence and the detached post, similar to view 1.
